entities.name: Mental Model Problem

entities.name: Technology Problem
entities.context: The misdiagnosed issue - what people think they have but actually don't

entities.name: Technique Collection

entities.name: Systems Integration
entities.context: The missing piece - understanding how techniques and tools fit together as a whole

relationships.context: V frames mental model problem as the actual issue, technology problem as the misdiagnosis
Collecting techniques without understanding fit is a symptom of the mental model problem
Integration understanding is what's missing when people just collect techniques
